gates.title: Installation reproduzierbar
gates.scope: CI installs dependencies and builds the Studio, but a fresh independent M1-Pro installation by a novice has not been evidenced.
gates.blocker: Fresh-machine or isolated-user installation run is missing.
gates.nextAction: Run the documented installation path in a clean macOS user or disposable environment and record command, duration, failures and final route.

gates.title: Anfänger-Onboarding vollständig
gates.scope: Technical guided onboarding in training and production modes.

gates.title: Canon- und Freigabegrenzen verständlich
gates.scope: Training, production and creative approval boundaries are visible and machine-checked.

evidence.visualCountercheck: Public Academy and LR5.1 routes show HUMAN REVIEW and EXECUTION BLOCKED

gates.title: Character-, Set- und Voice-Workflow geführt
gates.scope: The workflow is guided; no creative master is claimed or approved.

evidence.visualCountercheck: Academy stages character_masters, location_masters and voice_masters require human review

gates.title: Episode-Workflow geführt
gates.scope: The technical path from brief to handoff is guided; no finished episode is claimed.

evidence.visualCountercheck: Twelve sequential Academy stages are visible on desktop and mobile

gates.title: QA und sichtbare Reviews vollständig geführt
gates.scope: Review and QA gates are present and cannot auto-approve creative output.

evidence.visualCountercheck: Public Academy runtime reports creativeApprovalGranted=false and finalEpisodeApprovalGranted=false

gates.title: Backup, Delete und Restore geprüft
gates.scope: Technical state deletion and restore are proven for the production loop and selected pilot package.

evidence.runtimeProof: LR4 Pages run 29152807415 and regression in Pages run 29158037952
evidence.visualCountercheck: Studio runtime shows state deletion, retained package and matching restore hashes

gates.title: Fehlerdiagnose und Recovery geführt
gates.scope: Technical recovery tools, read-only scanners and operator guidance are present.

evidence.visualCountercheck: Academy stages expose error help and stop rules

gates.title: Export und Übergabe reproduzierbar geführt
gates.scope: Timing, subtitle and production handoff paths are reproducible for source-bound technical candidates, not a final episode.

evidence.test: npm run export:ep001-timing and Academy contract tests
evidence.visualCountercheck: Academy release_handoff stage remains HUMAN REVIEW

gates.title: Vollständiger Nullwissen-Abnahmelauf öffentlich bewiesen
gates.scope: Requires a real person without prior project knowledge.
gates.blocker: No independent novice test person and no signed acceptance record exist.
gates.nextAction: Execute docs/NULLWISSEN_ACCEPTANCE_PROTOCOL_DE.md with an independent tester and attach the evidence packet.

operationalRisks.detail: A later fallback reporter temporarily replaced stronger public deploy evidence in Issue #11.

nextHumanGate.effectIfApproved: Exactly one source-bound Ricco candidate may be generated for review. No master approval is implied.
